flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Arizona Christian University rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($30.6k → $35.1k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Arizona Christian University rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($30.6k → $35.1k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Arizona Christian University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.3% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Arizona Christian University rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 (1.0k → 1.2k).
